# Optional architecture decisions (`docs/adr/`)

**This repository** may have zero ADRs. Record decisions in [`specs/`](../../../specs/) when that matches existing spec discipline ([`specs` rule](../../../.cursor/rules/specs.mdc)).

If you add a **dedicated ADR** under `docs/adr/`, a minimal template:

- **ID** and **title** (e.g. `ADR-0001-playlist-merge-rules.md`)
- **Status** — Proposed / Accepted / Superseded
- **Context** — the forces and constraints
- **Decision** — what we chose, in one short paragraph
- **Consequences** — trade-offs and what this rules out
- **Links** to related `specs/` or code

Only add an ADR when the same refactor or architecture question is likely to resurface; skip one-off or obvious choices.
